news.t: Xtrackers by DWS Launches its First Active ETF: NRES

holdings.infoBox: NRES is an equity ETF with a total of 74 individual holdings. The top holdings are Nutrien stock at 5.93%, Newmont at 4.40%, Glencore at 3.90%, TotalEnergies SE at 3.59%, and Shell at 3.33%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers Rreef Global Natural Resources ETF (NRES) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed, investing in equity and equity-related securities of companies within the global natural resources sector. The fund aims for capital growth and income generation NRES was launched on Feb 27, 2024 and is issued by Xtrackers.

data.title: Xtrackers by DWS Launches its First Active ETF: NRES
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--DWS, one of the world's leading asset managers, announced today the listing of its first actively-managed exchange-traded fund (ETF), the Xtrackers RREEF Global Natural Reso...
